description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring several large, rectangular solar panels mounted on a flat, platform-like base. The panels are arranged in a staggered configuration, with some tilted at an angle and others positioned upright, likely to maximize sunlight capture. The base appears to be constructed from a combination of metallic and composite materials, with a grid-like pattern and raised sections that may house electrical components or provide structural support. The surface is predominantly gray and blue, with a distinct red strip along one edge, possibly indicating a boundary or safety marking. The installation includes several blocky structures that could serve as inverters, junction boxes, or mounting supports. The overall design suggests a modular, ground-mounted solar array suitable for urban environments such as rooftops, parking lots, or dedicated solar parks.
description: A modular solar energy installation with multiple tilted and upright panels on a grid-patterned, metallic base, featuring raised support structures and a red boundary strip.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main solar panels, one upright and one tilted, with the grid-patterned base and raised support structures clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tilt of the largest solar panel and the upright panel on the left, as well as the elongated, flat base and red boundary strip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the solar panels, the full length of the base, and the red strip along the edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of the panels from the other side, with the upright panel now on the right and the tilted panel on the left.
attribute_panel_orientation: Panels are tilted at approximately 30-45 degrees and upright at 90 degrees; azimuth direction is not clearly defined; orientation appears fixed.
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with metallic (likely aluminum or steel) support frames and a flat platform base.
attribute_array_configuration: Clustered arrangement with 3 main panels in staggered positions, not in a strict grid or row.
